title: sphenostigma gracile
intro: Sphenostigma gracile, also known as the bitter calabash, is a plant species that belongs to the family Capparaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sphenostigma gracile include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Sphenostigma gracile is often used in the form of a decoction, powder, or juice, and is also incorporated into traditional remedies, such as teas and tonics.
